user.title: Entity Auto-Labeler
user.description: Automatically label your entities based on their domain and device class. You can configure the rules after setup and trigger a run with the `auto_labeler.run` service.

data.overwrite: Overwrite existing labels instead of merging
data.run_on_startup: Run once on Home Assistant start

run.name: Run labeler
run.description: Scan all entities and apply matching labels.

overwrite.name: Overwrite
overwrite.description: Replace existing labels instead of merging.

entities.name: Entities
entities.description: Limit the run to these entities.

cleanup.name: Cleanup labels
cleanup.description: Remove labels that were created by Auto-Labeler.
